name: @bimanus/desktop
author: nexusone <tlztanluzhe@gmail.com>
description: Bimanus desktop shell for AI coding agents

scripts.bun:build:deps: for dir in ../../packages/session-driver ../../packages/pi-sdk-driver ../../packages/catalogs ../../packages/mcp-bridge-extension; do (cd "$dir" && bun run build); done
scripts.build: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run build:notification-helper && electron-vite build
scripts.bun:build: bun run bun:build:deps && bun run build:notification-helper && electron-vite build
scripts.preview: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run build:notification-helper && electron-vite preview
scripts.bun:preview: bun run bun:build:deps && bun run build:notification-helper && electron-vite preview
scripts.package: pnpm run build && pnpm run prepare:macos-node-runtime:arm64 && pnpm run prepare:macos-node-runtime:x64 && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.bun:package: bun run bun:build && bun run prepare:macos-node-runtime:arm64 && bun run prepare:macos-node-runtime:x64 && bun run scripts/bun-package-wrapper.mjs electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.package:dir: pnpm run build && pnpm run prepare:macos-node-runtime:arm64 && pnpm run prepare:macos-node-runtime:x64 && electron-builder --mac --dir --publish never
scripts.bun:package:dir: bun run bun:build && bun run prepare:macos-node-runtime:arm64 && bun run prepare:macos-node-runtime:x64 && bun run scripts/bun-package-wrapper.mjs electron-builder --mac --dir --publish never
scripts.package:mac:x64: pnpm run build && pnpm run prepare:macos-node-runtime:x64 && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:mac:x64:dir: pnpm run build && pnpm run prepare:macos-node-runtime:x64 && electron-builder --mac --dir --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:linux: pnpm run build && electron-builder --linux AppImage --publish never
scripts.bun:package:linux: bun run bun:build && bun run scripts/bun-package-wrapper.mjs electron-builder --linux AppImage --publish never
scripts.bun:package:linux:dir: bun run bun:build && bun run scripts/bun-package-wrapper.mjs electron-builder --linux --dir --publish never
scripts.verify:packaged-runtime-deps:mac:x64: pnpm run verify:runtime-model-registry && cross-env PI_APP_PACKAGE_PLATFORM=darwin PI_APP_PACKAGE_ARCH=x64 node scripts/assert-packaged-runtime-deps.mjs
scripts.verify:packaged-runtime-deps:linux: pnpm run verify:runtime-model-registry && cross-env PI_APP_PACKAGE_PLATFORM=linux node scripts/assert-packaged-runtime-deps.mjs
scripts.verify:packaged-runtime-deps:win: pnpm run verify:runtime-model-registry && cross-env PI_APP_PACKAGE_PLATFORM=win32 PI_APP_PACKAGE_ARCH=x64 node scripts/assert-packaged-runtime-deps.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:all: pnpm run test:e2e:core && pnpm run test:e2e:live && pnpm run test:e2e:native
scripts.test:e2e:runner: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts "$@"' --
scripts.test:e2e:core: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/core
scripts.test:e2e:native: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=foreground pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/native
scripts.test:e2e:live: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/live
scripts.test:dev:reload: cross-env PI_APP_DEV_RELOAD_MARKERS=1 PI_APP_OPEN_DEVTOOLS=0 pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/dev/dev-reload.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:navigation: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/core/navigation.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:archive: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/core/archive.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:new-thread-auto-title: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/core/new-thread-auto-title.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:composer-controls: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/core/composer-controls.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:mentions-diff: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/core/mentions-diff.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:persistence: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/core/persistence.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:reopen-state: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/core/reopen-state.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:skills-settings: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/core/skills-settings.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:notification-settings: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/core/notification-settings.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:workspace-menu: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/core/workspace-menu.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:worktrees: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/core/worktrees.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:notification-onboarding: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/live/notification-onboarding.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:parallel: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/live/parallel-runs.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:notifications: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/live/notifications.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:tool-calls: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/live/tool-calls.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:extension-dock: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/live/extension-dock.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:extension-dock-reload: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/live/extension-dock-reload.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:extension-command-compatibilit: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/live/extension-command-compatibility.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:extensions: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/live/extensions.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:extensions-dialogs: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/live/extensions-dialogs.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:extensions-session-isolation: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/live/extensions-session-isolation.spec.ts
scripts.test:native:open-folder: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=foreground pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/native/open-folder.spec.ts
scripts.test:native:paste: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=foreground pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/native/paste.spec.ts
scripts.test:native:attach-image: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=foreground pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/native/attach-image.spec.ts
scripts.test:prod:real-auth-contract: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/production/real-auth-contract.spec.ts
scripts.test:prod:packaged-smoke: pnpm run package:dir && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/production/packaged-smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:prod:packaged-terminal: pnpm run package:dir && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/production/packaged-terminal.spec.ts
scripts.test:prod:notification-onboarding: pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac --dir --publish never -c.directories.output=release-notification-onboarding && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background PI_APP_TEST_RELEASE_DIR=release-notification-onboarding pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/production/notification-onboarding-packaged.spec.ts
scripts.test:prod:notification-settings: pnpm run package:dir && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/production/notification-settings-packaged.spec.ts
scripts.test:prod:applications-relaunch: pnpm run package && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/production/applications-relaunch.spec.ts
scripts.test:prod:release-zip-smoke: pnpm run package && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/production/release-zip-smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:prod:release-zip-smoke:ci: cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/production/release-zip-smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:prod:open-folder-real: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=foreground pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test -c apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/production/open-folder-real.spec.ts
